title: OECD/AIAS ICTWSS — Trade Union Density
source_org: OECD (Employment, Labour and Social Affairs Directorate) / AIAS-HSI, University of Amsterdam
license_terms: OECD Terms and Conditions — free reuse with attribution (data jointly produced with AIAS-HSI)
notes: SDMX dataflow OECD.ELS.SAE:DSD_TUD_CBC@DF_TUD(1.0), 'Trade union density'. Part of the OECD/AIAS ICTWSS database (rebranded from the original Visser ICTWSS database in 2021). Companion dataflow DF_CBC (collective bargaining coverage) downloaded separately in the collective-bargaining-coverage dataset folder — same underlying DSD_TUD_CBC data structure, different dataflow/measure.
